summary: Iteration 155 - UX Fixes Testing. All 7 features tested and PASSED. Products load correctly on Care/Travel mobile (10 products each). Pawmeter Score has responsive flex layout. No shipping text on product cards. Mira Quick Actions show Build Kit tab on travel/care/fit pages. Shop Care Essentials button scrolls to products section correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CarePage.jsx: Products section has id='care-products' and uses slice(0,10) with responsive grid (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5)
TravelPage.jsx: Products section has id='travel-products' with same responsive grid pattern
PawmoterScore.jsx: Uses responsive flex layout (flex-col sm:flex-row) at line 131
ProductCard.jsx: No shipping text found - clean product card implementation
MiraChatWidget.jsx: Quick Actions tabs show Build Kit button with pillar-specific naming (Build Travel Kit, Build Care Kit, Build Fitness Kit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX fixes verified working. Care/Travel pages load 10 products on mobile. Mira widget shows Build Kit buttons on travel/care/fit pages. Shop Care Essentials button scrolls to products section.
